violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025
The drain plugs for the 3-bay sink were not in good repair. Drain plugs must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
No hot water was available at the time of inspection. Per PIC, hot water tank will be fixed this week. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
